notes:
Fixes in v1.4.1:
- Fixed a startup crash (tkinterdnd2 init) on the bundled build
- Drag and drop now works correctly in the packaged app

Includes all v1.4.0 features:
- Batch processing - watermark an entire folder in one click
- Watermark presets - save and recall named configs
- Recent files dropdown
- Word document watermarking (.docx/.doc) with PDF export
- Gold accent theme
